name: Seahawk Gold Corp.
summary: Seahawk Gold Corp. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral resource properties in Canada. The company focuses on gold deposits. It holds 100% interests in the Mystery, Touchdown, Xtra Point, and Blitz properties located in the Urban-Barry Greenstone Belt region within the Abitibi sub-province, Quebec, Canada. The company was formerly known as Seahawk Ventures Inc. and changed its name to Seahawk Gold Corp. in September 2020. Seahawk Gold Corp. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Coquitlam, Canada.
